question_text: You stand 85 metres from a cliff and clap your hands. Sound travels at 340 m/s in air. Calculate the time delay between your clap and hearing the echo. Show your working.
explanation: The sound must travel to the cliff (85 m) and back (85 m), making a total distance of 170 m. Time = distance ÷ speed = 170 ÷ 340 = 0.5 seconds. Always remember echoes involve a round trip!
